name: Multi Light
description: Basic protection against ads and trackers. Minimal breakage risk for low-resource devices.

name: Multi Normal
description: Balanced protection for everyday use. Adds OISD sources to the Light base.

name: Multi Pro
description: The recommended base. Extended protection against ads, trackers, and malicious sites.

name: Multi Pro++
description: Maximum protection. Blocks more aggressive tracking and metrics (Higher breakage risk).

name: Multi Ultimate
description: The most aggressive list. Includes almost all other specialized extensions.

name: Threat Intelligence (TIF)
description: Critical security feed targeting scams, phishing, and malware C2 infrastructure.

name: TIF Medium
description: Balanced Threat Intelligence feed between Light and Full.

name: TIF Light
description: Lightweight version of the Threat Intelligence Feed for low-RAM devices.

name: NSFW / Adult
description: Blocks adult content, pornography, and shock sites.

name: Gambling
description: Blocks online casinos, betting, and gambling platforms.

name: Social Networks
description: Blocks all major social media platforms (Facebook, TikTok, etc.).

name: Bypass Prevention
description: Blocks VPNs, Proxies, and DoH providers used to bypass filtering.

name: Encrypted DNS Only
description: Targeted block for DNS-over-HTTPS and DNS-over-TLS providers.

name: Dynamic DNS
description: Blocks often-abused Dynamic DNS services used for malware hosting.

name: No SafeSearch
description: Blocks search engines that do not support or enforce a Strict SafeSearch mode.

name: Badware Hoster
description: Blocks hosting services known to frequently host malicious software.

name: Fake & Scam
description: Blocks fake shops, fraudulent sites, and scam landing pages.

name: Anti-Piracy
description: Blocks torrent sites, warez, and illegal streaming platforms.

name: Abused TLDs
description: Blocks risky Top Level Domains (like .zip, .top, .surf) commonly used for malware.

name: Tracking Extension
description: Extra telemetry and tracking protection (Included in Pro+).

name: Pop-up Ads
description: Blocks malicious and annoying pop-up infrastructure.

name: Encrypted Ads
description: Targeted blocks for ads served via encrypted/obfuscated channels.

name: Native - Germany
description: Regional ad/tracker blocks for German-speaking users.

name: Native - France
description: Regional ad/tracker blocks for French-speaking users.

name: Native - Russia
description: Regional ad/tracker blocks for Russian-speaking users.

name: Native - China
description: Regional ad/tracker blocks for Chinese users.

name: Top Native
description: Consolidated regional blocks for the most common languages.

name: Threat Intel (Generic)
description: Broad threat intelligence feed covering various cyber threats.

name: Apple Services
description: Blocks Apple telemetry and service tracking.

name: Microsoft/Windows Services
description: Blocks Windows telemetry and Microsoft data collection.

name: TikTok Block
description: Specific block for TikTok and its tracking/fingerprinting infrastructure.

name: Amazon FireTV
description: Blocks Amazon FireTV telemetry and tracking.

name: Samsung TV
description: Blocks Samsung Smart TV telemetry and tracking.

name: LG TV
description: Blocks LG Smart TV telemetry and tracking.

name: Xiaomi Services
description: Blocks Xiaomi device telemetry and tracking.

name: DNS Rebind Protection
description: Prevents DNS rebinding attacks against local network services.

name: OISD NSFW
description: Aggressive adult content blocking. Covers adult sites, explicit image hosts and related CDNs.

name: OISD Big
description: Large general-purpose blocklist covering ads, trackers, and malware. Requires ~48 MB free RAM.
